rubrics.name: Email Structure
rubrics.description: Checks subject, greeting, closing, signature and professional formatting

rubrics.name: Email Tone
rubrics.description: Assesses whether the email maintains a professional, respectful, and responsible tone suitable for workplace communication when reporting a delay to a manager and informing colleagues.

rubrics.name: Accuracy
rubrics.description: Checks whether the email correctly communicates the situation, including the task delay, valid reason for the delay, and accurate mention of relevant stakeholders while maintaining grammatical correctness and factual consistency.

rubrics.name: Clarity
rubrics.description: Measures how clearly the participant explains the delay, including the reason for the delay, the current status of the task, expected next steps, and any required support or resources needed to complete the task.

rubrics.name: Conciseness
rubrics.description: Evaluates whether the email communicates the delay, stakeholders involved, and required support in a clear and direct manner without unnecessary repetition or irrelevant details.
